title: Tender Malt Uruguayan Chocolate Empanadas
description: These empanadas are a delicious and unique dessert featuring a malty and fluffy interior, surrounded by a crispy 00-flour crust and topped with tempered chocolate, making them a perfect treat for anyone looking for a macrobiotic-friendly dessert option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the 00 flour, malt powder, and salt.
Add the melted butter, eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a spoonful of tempered chocolate in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the chocolate and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of water and bake for 20 minutes.
Allow the empanadas to cool before serving.
